title: andropogon glaucophyllus
intro: Andropogon glaucophyllus, also known as Kalihiri, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Andropogon glaucophyllus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparation of Kalihiri typically involves drying and powdering the plant, which can then be used in various forms such as tea, capsules, or infusions.
